artifactType: mixed (long-horizon timing/throughput + held-out adapter-eval copied back)
registeredResult: registered x86 RunPod GPU (live GRPO, vLLM-colocate); GPU type not recorded in copied-back logs

timing.note: GRPO train proper ~428s; remainder of the 2867.76s is dep build + model download + held-out eval + copyback.

loadBearingMetric: passAt1 (fraction of held-out cases with verifier reward==1.0). meanReward is NOT load-bearing.
verifiedStepCoverage: N/A — provenance attribution task, not a step task; no VSC in artifact.

passAt1EvalStats.pairedBy: case_id (94 paired held-out cases, identical for both pods)

poweredVerdict.note: MDE 0.1445 > tolerance 0.05 at N=94 (paired_rho=0.5): probe CANNOT resolve a 0.0213 effect.

meanRewardContext.interpretation: Large meanReward gain comes from converting forbidden-assertion VIOLATIONS (reward -1) into ABSTENTIONS (reward +0.5): falseForbiddenAssertRate 0.169 -> 0.028/0.070. It did NOT convert into new full passes, so passAt1 barely moved (+2 items, underpowered).
meanRewardContext.rewardSpreadOverGroup: non-degenerate: 5 distinct reward values in [-1.0, 1.0]; train reward_std mostly 0.13-0.55 (group reward spread > 0).

harnessCheck.templateTrap: Subject is a CHAT/instruct model (glm-4-9b-chat-hf). base passAt1=0.5106 and non-degenerate reward spread indicate the prompt template is FUNCTIONAL (not the broken-template 0/N case); cannot confirm chat-template application from copied-back logs.
harnessCheck.verdict: NOT a first real positive. Harness is HEALTHY (base passAt1=0.51, working verifier, reward spread>0), but on the LOAD-BEARING passAt1 the adapter uplift is +0.0213 (+2/94), bootstrap 95% CI [0.0, 0.053] touches zero, McNemar p=0.48, and the probe is UNDERPOWERED (MDE 0.14 >> 0.02). The headline meanReward +0.20 is a partial-credit/abstention shift, NOT a capability (full-pass) gain.

objectiveGate: PASS for the long-horizon objective (a fresh live-GRPO pod adapter-eval was produced, copied back, and parses). This is an EXECUTION-truth gate (a real >1800s GPU run completed), NOT a capability gate.
